footer.copyright: © 2026 PipelineGPT · ASME Foundation Hermann Rosen Award for Pipeline Innovation
footer.disclaimer: All AI outputs require human review before operational action. No unreviewed recommendation triggers a pipeline decision.

landing.heroEyebrow: Pipeline Integrity Intelligence · PHMSA Data · Cited Answers
landing.heroHeadline: Query your pipeline data in any language.
landing.heroSubtext: PipelineGPT turns your ILI reports, SCADA exports, and PHMSA incident records into an instantly queryable knowledge base — with citations and human oversight built in.
landing.f1Body: Ask any question about your pipeline data — no SQL, no special syntax, any language. The system retrieves answers directly from your uploaded ILI reports, SCADA exports, and PHMSA records.
landing.f2Body: Every AI response cites its exact source document and page. No hallucinated references. Full, immutable audit trail exportable for PHMSA compliance reporting.
landing.f3Body: High-risk AI recommendations are automatically routed to a qualified engineer for review and sign-off. No unreviewed output ever influences an operational decision.
landing.footerCopyright: © 2026 PipelineGPT · ASME Foundation Hermann Rosen Award for Pipeline Innovation
landing.footerDisclaimer: All AI outputs require human review before operational action.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access is by invitation only. Use your credentials or the demo account.
login.leftHeadline: Pipeline integrity intelligence, powered by natural language.
login.leftSub: PHMSA incident data · ILI report analysis · SCADA exports · Cited answers · Engineer review

home.headline: Query Your Pipeline Data in Any Language
home.subtext: Upload ILI reports, SCADA exports, and PHMSA datasets. Ask any question. Get cited answers. Every high-risk recommendation reviewed by a qualified engineer.
home.pipeQuestion: What type of pipeline are you working with?
home.analysisQuestion: What do you need to analyse?
home.step1: Step 1 — Upload your pipeline documents (PDF, CSV, GeoJSON, ZIP)
home.step2: Step 2 — Ask questions in any language; the AI retrieves cited answers from your data
home.step3: Step 3 — High-risk recommendations are routed to a qualified engineer for sign-off
home.step4: Step 4 — View trends, confidence scores, and query analytics on the dashboard
home.step5: Step 5 — Export your immutable audit trail for PHMSA compliance reporting
home.beginDisabled: Select a pipeline type and analysis type to continue
home.disclaimer: All AI outputs require human review before any pipeline action is taken. No unreviewed recommendation ever triggers an operational change.

ingest.title: Data Ingestion
ingest.subtitle: Upload ILI reports, SCADA exports, PHMSA datasets, and GIS shapefiles
ingest.uploadSub: Supported formats: PDF, CSV, TSV, ZIP (PHMSA), GeoJSON, XLSX · Max {max} MB per file
ingest.phmsaSub: Download the latest PHMSA hazardous liquid and gas pipeline incident files from phmsa.dot.gov.
ingest.nextStepDesc: Your data is indexed — now open the AI chat to query it in any language.

chat.title: Pipeline Intelligence Chat
chat.subtitle: Ask anything about your uploaded pipeline data in any language — ILI reports, SCADA, PHMSA incidents, GIS.
chat.uploadNoticeTitle: Have you uploaded your pipeline data yet?
chat.uploadNoticeText: The AI can only answer questions about data that has been ingested. If you haven't done that yet, go to Step 1 first.
chat.examplePrompt: Ask anything about your pipeline data in any language — or try one of the examples below.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask anything about your pipeline integrity data…
chat.enterHint: Press {enter} to send · {shift} for new line
chat.hitlNotice: {count} response in this session is flagged for engineer sign-off before operational use. You can keep asking questions.
chat.hitlNoticePlural: {count} responses in this session are flagged for engineer sign-off before operational use. You can keep asking questions.
chat.nextStepDesc: High-risk AI responses are queued for qualified engineer review before operational use.

dashboard.title: Integrity Intelligence Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Live system metrics, segment risk register, corrosion progression, and compliance deadlines — in one view.
dashboard.highRisk: High risk · Critical · Immediate action required
dashboard.lowRisk: Low risk · Approved · Within acceptable limits
dashboard.queriesSub: AI responses generated from your documents
dashboard.documentsSub: ILI reports, PHMSA data, SCADA exports
dashboard.complianceExpiry: {count} compliance deadlines expire within 18 days — Jun 30 and Jul 15.
dashboard.segmentRiskSub: Ranked by risk level — ask PipelineGPT for any segment
dashboard.askPlaceholderQuote: "What are my upcoming PHMSA compliance obligations?"
dashboard.incidentRootCausesSub: Reportable incidents by primary cause · 287 total events
dashboard.incidentSource: Source: PHMSA Hazardous Liquid Incident Files (phmsa.dot.gov)
dashboard.wallLossTitle: Wall Loss Progression — Max Corrosion Depth (%)
dashboard.wallLossSub: Per ILI run · Dashed line = ASME B31.8S 40% immediate-action threshold
dashboard.wallLossSource: Source: ILI inspection reports ingested into PipelineGPT
dashboard.nextStepDesc: Every query, decision, and ingestion is logged immutably. Export for PHMSA compliance reporting.

audit.subtitleAdmin: Full system log — AI decisions, engineer reviews, user management, and configuration changes.
audit.subtitleOperator: Operational audit trail — AI recommendations, engineer reviews, anomaly flags, and compliance events.
audit.operationalOnly: Showing operational events only — AI queries, engineer decisions, anomaly alerts, and compliance flags. User login and system events are visible to admins only.
audit.csvIncludes: CSV includes: Event ID · Timestamp · Category · Actor · Segment · AI Confidence · Risk Level · Decision · Regulatory Reference.
audit.csvAdmin: Admin export includes all event types including user access logs.
audit.csvOperational: Your export covers operational events only — anomalies, decisions, queries, and ingestion.
audit.immutabilityNotice: Read-only · Immutable. Records are protected by PostgreSQL Row Level Security. Satisfies PHMSA IMP documentation requirements under 49 CFR §192.911 and §192.945.
audit.sampleEvents: Sample pipeline events — shown until AI query data is available

review.title: Review Queue
review.subtitle: High-risk AI responses awaiting qualified engineer review and sign-off.
review.noItemsSub: The queue is empty — all AI responses have been reviewed or no high-risk queries have been made.
review.nextStepDesc: Track AI performance, confidence scores, and compliance deadlines on the dashboard.
review.question: Question
